examples: I doubt any player in the history of the NBA kept himself in better shape and had more power than The Mailman.
You may or may not wish to know that your pet groomer, hairdresser, mailman and UPS guy all expect a holiday tip
She thought maybe the mailman could help her, but he didn't come.
"This is a no-dog community, " said Mr. Rose, a retired mailman from Hollywood, Fla.
"Never used them, " said Greg Stratton, a tanned and bearded retired mailman from Sauk Prairie, Wis.
